services.title: EV Charger Installation
services.description: Tesla, universal, and Level 2 home charging stations. Clean cable runs, proper permits, works every time.

services.title: Panel Upgrades
services.description: 200-amp service upgrades for modern electrical loads. Code-compliant installations with room to grow.

services.title: Generator Installation
services.description: Whole-house backup power systems. Automatic transfer switches and proper grounding.

services.title: Electrical Repairs
services.description: Troubleshooting, outlet installation, and electrical system maintenance.

about.heading: The electrical team Toms River calls first
about.body: We're the ones who show up on time and finish ahead of schedule. Clean work, straight answers, zero surprises on the bill.

reviews.name: Steven P.
reviews.text: Tesla charger install was seamless. Professional team completed work in two weeks, ran cable across house without cutting into walls.

reviews.name: Joseph G.
reviews.text: Very responsive team. Panel upgrade and EV install done with care and skill. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Frank C.
reviews.text: Excellent job on generator and EV charger. Easy to contact throughout process. Highly recommend.
